---
title: "Unit 2: Indices"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import sys,os
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.abspath('../../assets'))
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.abspath('../unit2-Indices'))
from Indices import generate
from collections import defaultdict

data = generate(
    types=[
        # LT1 — Multiplication
        "multiply_simple",
        "multiply_three_terms",
        "multiply_coefficients",
        "multiply_multivariable",
        # LT2 — Division
        "divide_simple",
        "divide_coefficients",
        "divide_multivariable",
        # LT3 — Power of a Power
        "power_simple",
        "power_coefficient",
        "power_multivariable",
        "power_negative_outer",
        "combine_same_power",
        # LT5 — Negative Indices
        "negative_evaluate",
        "negative_fraction_base",
        "negative_simplify",
        "negative_divide",
        # LT6 — Fractional Indices
        "fractional_unit",
        "fractional_nonunit",
        "fractional_negative",
        "fractional_of_fraction",
        # LT7 — Zero Index
        "zero_index",
        # LT8 — Complex Fractions
        "fraction_simple",
        "fraction_complex",
        "fraction_multivariable",
        "fraction_nested_power",
        # LT10 — Write as Power
        "write_as_power",
        # LT11 — Find Missing / Identify Error
        "find_missing_index",
        "find_missing_divide",
        "find_missing_power",
        "identify_error",
        # LT7s — Surds: Operate
        "surd_add_simple",
        "surd_subtract_simple",
        "surd_add_mixed",
        "surd_subtract_mixed",
        "surd_multiply_simple",
        "surd_multiply_coeff",
        "surd_multiply_chain",
        "surd_divide_simple",
        "surd_divide_coeff",
        # LT8s — Surds: Simplify
        "surd_simplify_basic",
        "surd_simplify_coeff",
        "surd_simplify_fraction",
        "surd_simplify_product",
        "surd_simplify_mixed_ops",
        "surd_simplify_chain",
        # LT9s — Surds: Expand & Rationalise
        "surd_expand_single",
        "surd_expand_double_simple",
        "surd_expand_double_mixed",
        "surd_expand_conjugate",
        "surd_expand_square",
        "surd_rationalise_simple",
        "surd_rationalise_coeff",
        "surd_rationalise_binomial",
        "surd_rationalise_full",
        "surd_rationalise_sum",
        "surd_rationalise_frac_sum",
        "surd_find_xy",
        "surd_pythagoras",
        "surd_trapezium_area",
    ],
    seed           = 42,
    show_solutions = True,
)
exercises = data["_exercises_qmd"]

# Group by difficulty
grouped = defaultdict(list)
for ex in exercises:
    grouped[ex["difficulty"]].append(ex)

```

## 🎯 Learning Targets

{{< include Indices-Learning-Targets.qmd >}}


## 🗂️ Formula Card

{{< include Alg-Indices-formulas.qmd >}}


## 📝 Practice Problems

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("easy", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("medium", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("hard", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

## ⚡ Test Your Knowledge {#sec-indices-worksheet}

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../assets/worksheet.css">
<script src="../../assets/worksheet.js"></script>

<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="wsGenerate()" disabled>🔄 New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="wsOpenPreview()">👁️ Preview & Print</button>
    <a href="https://app.flintk12.com/activities/index-laws-tuto-cd16e0/sessions/new" target="_blank" class="ws-btn flint">🤖 Get Help</a>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">⏳ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<div id="ws-container"></div>

<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">🖨️ Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">✕ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>

<script>
window.WS_CONFIG = {
  title: "Laws of Indices & Surds",
  unit: "Unit 2 · Indices & Surds",
  pyPath: "Indices.py",
  template: "word",
  count: 3,
  types: [
    // 🟡 Medium — Indices
    "multiply_coefficients",
    "multiply_multivariable",
    "divide_coefficients",
    "divide_multivariable",
    "power_coefficient",
    "power_multivariable",
    "negative_evaluate",
    "negative_fraction_base",
    "negative_simplify",
    "negative_divide",
    "fractional_unit",
    "fraction_simple",
    "find_missing_index",
    "find_missing_divide",
    "numeric_multiply",
    "numeric_divide",
    "write_as_power",
    "combine_same_power",
    // 🔴 Hard — Indices
    "power_negative_outer",
    "fractional_nonunit",
    "fractional_negative",
    "fractional_of_fraction",
    "fraction_complex",
    "fraction_multivariable",
    "fraction_nested_power",
    "find_missing_power",
    "numeric_mixed",
    // 🟡 Medium — Surds
    "surd_add_mixed",
    "surd_subtract_mixed",
    "surd_multiply_chain",
    "surd_divide_coeff",
    "surd_simplify_fraction",
    "surd_simplify_product",
    "surd_expand_double_simple",
    "surd_expand_conjugate",
    "surd_expand_square",
    "surd_rationalise_coeff",
    // 🔴 Hard — Surds
    "surd_simplify_mixed_ops",
    "surd_simplify_chain",
    "surd_expand_double_mixed",
    "surd_rationalise_binomial",
    "surd_rationalise_frac_sum",
    "surd_find_xy",
    "surd_pythagoras",
    "surd_trapezium_area"
  ]
};
</script>
```
